tagline: An unprofessional, unimportant, and undisciplined cabaret-style night of performance.
venueAddress: 317 East Houston Street, New York, NY 10002
accessibilityNote: The bar is on the ground floor. The performance venue and accessible bathrooms are accessed via a portable ramp (1.5 steps). Reserved seating available for accessibility needs upon request.
aboutText: Unprofessional is a quarterly night of cabaret, where you never quite know what you'll get. Launched on Maya Suess's birthday in February 2022, the show lives in the back room of The Parkside Lounge on Houston and Attorney in the Lower East Side.The programming is truly intergenerational, introducing younger performers to the legendary performers from the neighborhood. From Coney Island legends to drag kings, from performance artists to folk musicians, every edition is a different world.The programming is truly intergenerational, introducing younger performers to the legendary performers from the neighborhood. pressLinks.title: EV Grieve - A visit to the Unprofessional Variety Show

aboutDetails.title: The Venue
aboutDetails.text: The Parkside Lounge. A dive bar and performance venue catering to the artists, musicians, and freaks of the Lower East Side since 1908.

aboutDetails.title: Maya Suess
aboutDetails.text: Artist, educator, and arts administrator. Born on a small island off western Canada's coast. BFA from Emily Carr, MFA from Simon Fraser. She makes drawings, installations, videos, performances, and other mischievous entities.

aboutDetails.title: Klovis Gaynor
aboutDetails.text: Musical accompaniment at nearly every edition. Queer musician and "baroque punk" artist. Queens-based.

aboutDetails.title: Libby Paloma
aboutDetails.text: Set designer and production support. Queercrip, Mexican-American interdisciplinary artist working in sculpture, installation, and performance.

aboutDetails.title: The Deal
aboutDetails.text: Sliding scale cover. All monies go directly to the performers. Tickets through Humanitix, where 100% of booking fees go to charity.
